overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge navigating through stormy seas at dusk. The scene features operational navigation displays including radar and chart plotters while lightning illuminates the rough ocean waters ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking stormy seas

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface and ship bow

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel through rough seas while monitoring the radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: navigation display showing coastal chart with yellow landmass and vessel position
circular radar display with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
blue digital display showing depth sounder and vessel telemetry data
forward deck structure of the vessel with red safety markings
metal safety railing along the left side of the bow deck
metal safety railing along the right side of the bow deck
rough choppy sea surface with visible wave formations
dark overcast storm clouds meeting the horizon

segments.scene_description: View from the ship's bridge showing the forward deck cutting through rough stormy seas. Three navigation displays are visible overhead showing charts, radar, and depth data. The scene is dimly lit with mixed artificial and ambient light until a bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the ocean surface around the 5-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking stormy seas

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel through heavy seas while monitoring instruments

segments.scene_description: Continuing the journey through the storm with the ship maintaining steady forward motion. The navigation displays remain active with the radar continuously sweeping. The ocean remains turbulent with choppy waves visible beyond the bow railings under the dark stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, turbulent storm. It begins with a view of the forward deck cutting through rough seas, framed by the dim glow of overhead navigation displays showing charts, radar, and depth data. As the vessel pushes forward, a sudden, bright flash of lightning momentarily illuminates the churning ocean surface, cutting through the ambient gloom. The scene then settles back into a moody darkness while the ship maintains its steady course, with the radar continuously sweeping across the displays. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the choppy waves crashing beyond the bow railings under a heavy, stormy sky.
